stereotype: «ResourceAccess» — owns merchantGateway (Stripe Connect external merchant-of-record gateway)
volatility: Merchant-gateway ACCESS volatility — how the platform moves money out to / pulls money in from a customer through an external merchant-of-record gateway, and how a customer's connected (payout) account is provisioned; gateway-native idempotency mechanism encapsulated (Stripe Idempotency-Key header)

outbound.name: merchantGateway
outbound.how: direct, by value — plain Go methods; Activity-wrapped by settlementManager (ChargeCustomerActivity / PayoutCustomerActivity / CreateConnectedAccountActivity / ValidateStoredInstrumentActivity)

ops.note: Pulls a positive magnitude from the customer's stored instrument; idempotent on req.Key via Stripe Idempotency-Key header; hard decline → terminal ContentPolicy

fields.name: CustomerID
fields.note: uuid.UUID; must name a customer with an existing connected account (created via createConnectedAccount)

fields.name: CycleID
fields.note: billing cycle context for audit and part of Manager key derivation

fields.name: Amount
fields.note: POSITIVE magnitude in minor units + ISO-4217 currency; direction is the verb; non-positive is ContractMisuse

fields.name: Key
fields.note: caller-supplied deterministic key; shape: charge:{customerId}:{cycleId}:{actionInstance}:{attempt}; placed into Stripe Idempotency-Key header

fields.name: MovementID
fields.note: opaque gateway movement id; not a Stripe id

fields.name: Status
fields.note: MovementSucceeded only; declines are terminal fwra.Error

fields.name: Amount
fields.note: magnitude actually moved; echoes the request (or original on a deduped replay)

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error; ContentPolicy = hard decline (terminal, routes to interventionEngine.decideOnSettlementFailure); Transient/RateLimited/Infrastructure = retryable

ops.note: Pushes a positive magnitude to the customer's connected account; idempotent on req.Key; restricted/closed account → terminal ContentPolicy

fields.name: CustomerID
fields.note: uuid.UUID; must name a customer with a live connected account

fields.name: CycleID
fields.note: settlement cycle context

fields.name: Amount
fields.note: POSITIVE magnitude to pay out; non-positive is ContractMisuse

fields.name: Key
fields.note: caller-supplied deterministic key; shape: payout:{customerId}:{cycleId}:{actionInstance}:{attempt}

fields.name: MovementID
fields.note: opaque gateway movement id

fields.name: Status
fields.note: MovementSucceeded only; failures are terminal fwra.Error

fields.name: Amount
fields.note: magnitude actually paid out

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error; ContentPolicy = restricted/closed connected account (terminal)

ops.note: Provisions the customer's merchant connected account at onboarding; idempotent on req.Key; KYC refusal → terminal ContentPolicy

fields.name: CustomerID
fields.note: uuid.UUID

fields.name: Onboarding
fields.note: infrastructure-neutral gateway-neutral KYC/merchant onboarding detail; fields refined in C-MA

fields.name: Key
fields.note: caller-supplied deterministic key; shape: createAccount:{customerId}; naturally once per customer

fields.name: AccountRef
fields.note: opaque connected-account reference binding customer to gateway; not a Stripe acct_… id; recorded by settlementStateAccess.bindGatewayLive

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error; ContentPolicy = KYC/onboarding refusal (terminal); ContractMisuse = missing required onboarding field

ops.note: Zero-amount-authorizes the customer's stored charge instrument at registration; no money moves; failed auth → terminal ContentPolicy; idempotent on req.Key

fields.name: CustomerID
fields.note: uuid.UUID; stored charge instrument addressed by CustomerID inside this seam (infrastructure-opaque)

fields.name: Key
fields.note: caller-supplied deterministic key; shape: validate:{customerId}:{attempt}; attempt increments only on deliberate re-validation

fields.name: AuthorizationID
fields.note: opaque gateway zero-amount authorization id; not a Stripe id

fields.name: Status
fields.note: MovementSucceeded only (zero-amount auth authorized); failed validation is terminal fwra.Error

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error; ContentPolicy = instrument declined (terminal, routes to registration-failure path); NotFound = no addressable instrument

dataContracts: CustomerID = uuid.UUID // settlement counterparty aggregate identity
CycleID = string // billing cycle context for audit/key derivation
GatewayRequestKey = fwra.IdempotencyKey // caller-supplied deterministic key placed into Stripe Idempotency-Key header
Money = struct{ MinorUnits int64; Currency string } // positive magnitude, ISO-4217; NEVER float; direction is the verb
ChargeRequest = struct{ CustomerID; CycleID; Amount Money; Key GatewayRequestKey }
PayoutRequest = struct{ CustomerID; CycleID; Amount Money; Key GatewayRequestKey }
CreateConnectedAccountRequest = struct{ CustomerID; Onboarding OnboardingDetail; Key GatewayRequestKey }
ValidateStoredInstrumentRequest = struct{ CustomerID; Key GatewayRequestKey } // no Money — zero-amount auth fixed by verb
OnboardingDetail = struct{ /* gateway-neutral KYC fields; C-MA refines */ }
MovementStatus = int // MovementSucceeded only; declines are fwra.Error not a status value
GatewayMovement = struct{ MovementID string; Status MovementStatus; Amount Money } // opaque correlation token
ConnectedAccountRef = struct{ AccountRef string } // opaque connected-account reference
InstrumentValidation = struct{ AuthorizationID string; Status MovementStatus } // opaque zero-amount auth reference
errorModel: fwra.Error (framework-go/resourceaccess.Error); Retryable seeded from Kind on construction. RETRYABLE: Transient, RateLimited, Infrastructure. TERMINAL: ContentPolicy (hard gateway decline or failed zero-amount auth — no money moved; Detail carries decline reason), Auth (platform credentials invalid), NotFound (unknown connected account / customer / instrument), ContractMisuse (pre-condition violated: non-positive Amount, empty Key, missing Onboarding field), Conflict (same GatewayRequestKey with different payload — derivation bug; never retried). Key safety rule: Activity-level transient retry reuses SAME key; intervention Retry or recompute-delta MUST use a DIFFERENT key (C-MST-I1).
idempotency: Caller-supplied deterministic GatewayRequestKey placed into the Stripe Idempotency-Key header (24h dedup window). Required key shape: cycle-scoped verbs = {op}:{customerId}:{cycleId}:{actionInstance}:{attempt}; registration verbs = createAccount:{customerId} and validate:{customerId}:{attempt}. Same key → original result, no second money movement. Key-reused-with-different-payload → terminal Conflict.

revisions.byActivity: D-MA (Detailed design — merchantGatewayAccess); RESET to in-progress after prior done marker found to be copy-paste corruption
revisions.summary: Initial contract drafted: 3 ops (chargeCustomer, payoutCustomer, createConnectedAccount); validateStoredInstrument flagged as DSL inconsistency OQ-3

Ruled 4 ops required: validateStoredInstrument is a real 4th op and hard dependency of frozen settlementManager (ValidateStoredInstrumentActivity §6.4; RegisterCustomerWorkflow §6.3); 3-op gateway would break frozen consumer seam

APPROVED — FROZEN (pending senior re-review of amendment). Added §2.4 validateStoredInstrument with ValidateStoredInstrumentRequest/InstrumentValidation data contracts, validate:{customerId}:{attempt} key shape, ContentPolicy/NotFound decline taxonomy. Reconciled architecture.dsl lines 229+400 to name all four verbs. Decline-kind convergence FU-MA-DECLINE-1 filed (ContentPolicy now; additive Declined kind deferred). C-MST-I1 idempotency-key shape pinned in §6.4.
